title: 配置虚拟网卡端口安全 (MAC 欺骗防护/DHCP 守卫/路由守卫/来宾组网)
output:
CREATED VM 50B9AE98-F9E0-4540-895E-348AAEFBCE63
CONNECTED NIC EnabledState=2
SEC template InstanceID=Microsoft:Definition\776E0BA7-94A1-41C8-8F28-951F524251B5\Default
AddFeatureSettings RV=0
READBACK AllowMacSpoofing=True EnableDhcpGuard=True EnableRouterGuard=True AllowTeaming=True
RESULT: PASS all four security flags = TRUE
CLEANUP DestroySystem RV=4096
notes: 端口安全功能加在网卡连接(Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData, EPAS)上，须用 Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddFeatureSettings(EPAS.__PATH, @(嵌入实例 GetText(1))) 下发。同步返回 RV=0(无 Job)。
前置链路：创建第二代虚拟机 -> AddResourceSettings 合成网卡 -> AddResourceSettings EPAS 连接到交换机(HostResource=交换机 __PATH，端口 EnabledState=2)。虚拟机无需开机。

安全功能实例不要裸 CreateInstance；应从 Msvm_EthernetSwitchFeatureCapabilities 经 Msvm_FeatureSettingsDefineCapabilities 关联取默认 Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortSecuritySettingData(InstanceID=Microsoft:Definition\776E0BA7-94A1-41C8-8F28-951F524251B5\Default) 后 .psbase.Clone() 修改。

Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortSecuritySettingData 关键属性(均为 boolean)：AllowMacSpoofing(MAC 欺骗防护) / EnableDhcpGuard(DHCP 守卫) / EnableRouterGuard(路由守卫) / AllowTeaming(来宾内组网)；另有 MonitorMode(uint8 0/1/2)、AllowIeeePriorityTag、VirtualSubnetId(uint32)。
在以 -File 运行的 .ps1 中，WQL 过滤器 "InstanceID LIKE '%\Default'" 内的单反斜杠会使 WMI 报无效查询；应改为不带 -Filter、用 PowerShell 端 -match 'Default$' 挑选模板。
该类自 build 9200 起提供。读回经 EPAS.GetRelated('Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortSecuritySettingData')。
title_en: Configure Virtual Network Adapter Port Security (MAC Spoofing Protection / DHCP Guard / Router Guard / Guest Teaming)
notes_en: The port security feature is applied on the network adapter connection (Msvm_EthernetPortAllocationSettingData, EPAS) and must be applied via Msvm_VirtualSystemManagementService.AddFeatureSettings(EPAS.__PATH, @(embedded instance GetText(1))). It returns RV=0 synchronously (no Job).

Prerequisite chain: create a generation 2 VM -> AddResourceSettings for the synthetic adapter -> AddResourceSettings for the EPAS connecting to the switch (HostResource=switch __PATH, port EnabledState=2). The VM need not be powered on.

Do not use a bare CreateInstance for the security feature instance; instead, obtain the default Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortSecuritySettingData (InstanceID=Microsoft:Definition\776E0BA7-94A1-41C8-8F28-951F524251B5\Default) from Msvm_EthernetSwitchFeatureCapabilities through the Msvm_FeatureSettingsDefineCapabilities association, then .psbase.Clone() and modify it.

Key Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortSecuritySettingData properties (all boolean): AllowMacSpoofing (MAC spoofing protection) / EnableDhcpGuard (DHCP guard) / EnableRouterGuard (router guard) / AllowTeaming (in-guest teaming); also MonitorMode (uint8 0/1/2), AllowIeeePriorityTag, VirtualSubnetId (uint32).

In a .ps1 run with -File, a single backslash inside the WQL filter "InstanceID LIKE '%\Default'" causes WMI to report an invalid query; instead, drop -Filter and select the template on the PowerShell side with -match 'Default$'.
This class has been available since build 9200. Read back via EPAS.GetRelated('Msvm_EthernetSwitchPortSecuritySettingData').
